title: Neither Beast Nor Bird
content:
A Beast he would be, or a bird,
    As might suit, thought the Bat: but he erred.
    When the battle was done,
    He found that no one
    Would take him for friend at his word.

    Between Two Stools You May Come To The Ground
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Neither Beast Nor Bird"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
